title: About Infinitybloc
intro: Infinitybloc is a Block Producer candidate for the Telos network, dedicated to supporting the growth and success of the Telos ecosystem.
mission: We are committed to providing reliable infrastructure, supporting decentralized governance, and fostering innovation within the Telos community.
leaderBio: Justin brings extensive experience in blockchain technology and strategy, serving as Head of Strategy at Telos Foundation.
ownership: Infinitybloc is independently owned and operated. We are not affiliated with any government or corporate entity beyond our commitment to the Telos network.
